description.value: Create invisible, mindless, shapeless force within close range. Has DR 8, 4 HP, Strength 2, can't attack. Can perform simple tasks: fetch, clean, mend, fold, light fires, serve food. Can carry 30 lbs or drag 60 lbs. Command as [Minor] action. Moves 15 feet per round. Vanishes if reduced to 0 HP or when weave ends.

system.effect: Create invisible, mindless, shapeless force within close range. Has DR 8, 4 HP, Strength 2, can't attack. Can perform simple tasks: fetch, clean, mend, fold, light fires, serve food. Can carry 30 lbs or drag 60 lbs. Command as [Minor] action. Moves 15 feet per round. Vanishes if reduced to 0 HP or when weave ends.
system.weavingRoll: Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
